name: Meta Ads AI Automation - Approval First

nodes.name: Set Workflow Config
nodes.notes: Replace ad_account_id. Store the Meta token in n8n credentials or env vars, not here.

nodes.name: Get Meta Ad Insights
nodes.notes: Create HTTP Header Auth credential in n8n: Authorization = Bearer YOUR_META_ACCESS_TOKEN

nodes.name: AI Performance Analysis
nodes.notes: Create HTTP Header Auth credential in n8n: Authorization = Bearer YOUR_OPENAI_API_KEY. You can replace this with Claude API if preferred.

parameters.jsCode:
const content = $json.choices?.[0]?.message?.content || 'No AI report returned.';
return [{ json: { report: content, generated_at: new Date().toISOString() } }];

nodes.name: Send Approval Report Email
nodes.notes: Replace sender and recipient. Configure SMTP credentials in n8n.
